chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | April 11, 2025 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and announcements for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It covers important dates, academic opportunities, and department news relevant to current students pursuing degrees in EECS fields.

The newsletter includes information about upcoming deadlines, course offerings, research opportunities, and campus events. Students are encouraged to regularly check the newsletter for announcements regarding scholarships, internships, and academic advising sessions. It serves as a central resource for staying informed about department activities and student support services.

Open Faculty Positions: The EECS department is actively recruiting for faculty positions in various specializations. Qualified candidates with expertise in electrical engineering, computer science, and related interdisciplinary areas are encouraged to apply. These positions offer opportunities to join a leading research institution and contribute to undergraduate and graduate education.
